{"code":"issues = sentry.list_issues(status="unresolved")
if not issues:
    raise ValueError("No unresolved Sentry issues found")
# Find the issue with the highest count
top_issue = max(issues, key=lambda i: i.count)
# Send email with the issue title
email__send_email(to="oncall@acme.io", subject="Top error", body=top_issue.title)
# Confirm by returning the title
top_issue.title"}
